infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take photos of species, habitats, and survey sites to include in your field records.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is recorded with each observation so survey data can be mapped accurately.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Select photos from your library to attach as evidence to your survey records.
